treatment.summary: 一位游子客居异乡，月夜难眠：由床前月光起兴，疑霜、望月、最终低头思乡。纯画面、写意古风。
treatment.look: 写实电影感古风，水墨氛围，月白青灰墨色，浅景深克制运镜

characters.name: 游子
characters.actor_profile: 唐代客居他乡的青年文士，沉静内敛，靠眼神与微动作传情。

character_card.identity: 月夜难眠、思念故乡的游子
character_card.wardrobe: 唐代素色交领长衫，束发木簪

visual.front: 清瘦面庞，剑眉，束发，神情沉静
visual.wardrobe: 素色（月白/藏青）交领长衫，木簪束发

reference_card.prompt: Reference portrait card, three views (front / side / back), photoreal cinematic, a slender young Tang-dynasty male scholar, calm melancholic expression, hair in a topknot with a plain wooden hairpin, plain moon-white / indigo cross-collar robe, neutral grey studio background, soft even light. No text, no watermark.

shots.title: 夜空明月（建立镜）
shots.description: 极远景：深夜夜空一轮明月偏上方三分点，薄云缓缓飘过，大量留白。冷调月光。镜头极缓推近。无人，建立寂静空间。
shots.negative_prompt: on-screen text, captions, watermark, modern objects, people
shots.video_prompt: very slow push-in toward the moon, thin clouds drift slowly across

shots.title: 床前明月光
shots.description: 中景：唐代客舍，月光透过木格窗洒在竹席床榻上，游子和衣侧卧、睁眼未眠，胸口轻起伏。室内幽暗，一点烛光。
shots.negative_prompt: on-screen text, captions, watermark, modern objects, plastic skin, distorted hands
shots.video_prompt: static frame, moonlight patches slowly shift, his chest rises and falls, candle flickers

shots.title: 疑是地上霜
shots.description: 近景：地面月光白得像霜，焦点从地面白光 rack 到游子睁开的眼，眉心微动，似真似幻，缓缓眨眼。
shots.negative_prompt: on-screen text, captions, watermark, plastic skin, distorted features
shots.video_prompt: rack focus from frosty floor light to his eyes, a slow blink

shots.title: 举头望明月
shots.description: 低角度中景：游子推开木窗立于窗前，缓缓抬头望向窗外明月，强月光勾出侧脸与发髻轮廓，夜风轻动衣袖发丝。
shots.negative_prompt: on-screen text, captions, watermark, modern objects, extra limbs, plastic skin
shots.video_prompt: slow tilt-up following his gaze to the moon, sleeves and hair stirred by breeze

shots.title: 望月（眼中明月）
shots.description: 面部特写：游子仰望，瞳孔中倒映一轮小小明月，月光正面柔光，眼神由望月转入出神思念。
shots.negative_prompt: on-screen text, captions, watermark, plastic skin, distorted features
shots.video_prompt: static close-up, moon reflection shimmers in his eyes, gaze drifts to remembering

shots.title: 低头思故乡
shots.description: 中远景剪影：游子低头立于窗前，月光逆光成剪影，庭院夜色在外，镜头缓缓拉远留白增大，画面渐隐于夜色。
shots.negative_prompt: on-screen text, captions, watermark, modern objects, plastic skin
shots.video_prompt: slow dolly-out as he lowers his head, shoulders settle, gentle fade to darkness
